caption_summary: A man inside a cryo-pod on a snowy peak watches a blinking sensor, then faces forward as frost covers the glass.

panels.description: Close-up on a 30-year-old Middle Eastern man with thick beard and short hair wearing a green shirt, seated inside a futuristic transparent cryo-pod, staring intently with wide eyes at a blinking red sensor panel to his side; tight macro framing focused on his eyes and part of the sensor, soft cool lighting highlighting his anticipation.

Medium shot inside the cryo-pod showing the man slowly pivoting his head forward to face the camera directly with a stoic expression; his gaze meets the viewer’s directly, ambient cold lighting casts subtle reflections on the pod’s glass, hint of frost starting to form at edges.

Wide shot showing the man seated calmly as his eyes flutter closed, frost dramatically creeping across the entire cryo-pod’s transparent glass walls; outside the pod, a harsh snowy peak environment is revealed by the camera dollying backward and panning left, wind blowing snow in the cold, bleak landscape.
